form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start got back early 4th of 7 at Tampa Bay Downs on March 18 over 1106m, 2.5 len behind Oh' What A Day carrying 56.5kg at $1.80. The run before that 3rd of 10 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on March 5 over 1106m, 3 len behind War Warrior carrying 56kg at $12.70. Likely to go well from the rails draw.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months ran last of 7 at this track on March 22 over 1207m, 15 len behind Sonic Surge carrying 55.5kg at $28.90. Previously second-up came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at this track on December 12 over 1408m, 5.5 len behind My Favorite Bird with 54kg at $14.60. Needs to do a lot more.

form.formComment: At the latest run tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 9 at this track on March 20 over 1609m, 10 len behind Witcha Wish with 55.5kg at $6.40. form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently settled back and ran on when 4th of 7 at this track on March 6 over 1207m, 9 len behind Starship Juliette with 55.5kg at $14.80. The run before that 7th of 9 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on January 22 over 1710m, 13 len behind Forza Azzurri carrying 55.5kg at $8.50. Watch for him late in the piece.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Los Alamitos September 21 2024 over 1609m, a 0.3 lengths behind Eddie's Wave carrying 54.5kg at $6.30. On debut fourth of 8 at Gulfstream Park All Weather February 17 2024 over 1006m, 5 len behind Rhum Saint Esprit carrying 53.5kg at $4.80. Can get the job done.

form.formComment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, second last in a small field at this track on February 26 over 1106m, 8 len behind Never Count Me Out with 55.5kg at $3.90. Last start ran last of 11 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on March 15 over 1106m, 16 len behind Sweet Interlude carrying 52kg at $8.20. Better off looking to others.
